response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience as a full-stack engineer with a strong background in Java and JVM-related technologies (including C/C++ for IDE tooling at National Instruments). However, his recent work has focused heavily on Node.js, TypeScript, and other non-JVM stacks, with limited visible experience in enterprise Java/Kotlin tooling, Spring ecosystem, or IDE internals. His expertise in JVM languages appears dated, and his recent projects lack direct alignment with the role's requirements.
strengths: Strong background in C/C++ and Java, relevant for JVM tooling and IDE internals
Proven track record of building complex systems and contributing to open-source projects
Experience with developer tooling and automation (e.g., CI/CD, MCP frameworks)
concerns: Limited recent experience with Java/Kotlin enterprise frameworks (Spring, Quarkus, etc.)
Primary expertise in Node.js/TypeScript with no clear recent JVM-focused projects
No demonstrated contribution to or experience with IDEs or language tooling
